text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Reporting. I placed, but failed to obtain first.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I determined the cause to be a lack of training
and poor judgment. If these issues are not
addressed, we risk even worse results.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I ask that we review the race to quickly resolve
these problems.
choice_data_list: All right, we can do this together!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I ask that we review the race to quickly resolve
these problems.
choice_data_list: All right, we can do this together!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Acknowledged. "Full Speed to Victory" mode
activated. In addition, I am setting you as my
running partner.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: With you by my side, we will grasp victory.

We return to the academy and look back on the
race, exchanging opinions on how she can
improve.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Entering a state of franticness. Awaiting orders.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Please whip me into shape so that I can achieve
victory.

We return to the academy and look back on the
race with a critical eye. We make a plan to
improve Bourbon's sense of judgment!
